LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM WELDEMARIAM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR DISMISSAL AND JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE GOOD CAUSE FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE EXCUSABLE NEGLECT, THIS MOTION WAS NOT FILED WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME, AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A PROPOSED PLEADING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Order Granting Defts Motion For Dismissal And Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Appearances: ABRAHAM WELDEMARIAM, 415.409.6825, PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM WELDEMARIAM'S Motion To Set Aside Order Granting DefENDANts Motion For Dismissal And Judgment is denied. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate good cause for relief under CCP 473. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate excusable neglect, this motion was not filed within a reasonable time, and plaintiff failed to provide a proposed pleading. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

Notice Of Motion For Dismissal And Entry Of Judgment For Failure To Timely Amend
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ABRAHAM WELDEMARIAM, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS P&G - CLAIROL INCORPORATED AND THE PROCTER AND GAMBLE U.S. BUSINESS SERVICES' Motion For Dismissal And Entry Of Judgment For Failure To Timely Amend is Granted. No opposition filed. The Complaint is dismissed with prejudice as to Defendants P&G-Clairol, Inc. and The Proctor & Gamble U.S. Business Services Company pursuant to Civil Procedure Code section 581(f). Defendants shall prepare and submit a proposed form of order and judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Motion For Dismissal And Entry Of Judgment For Failure To Timely Amend
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Feb-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Abraham Weldemarian, Tel. 415.409.6825, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Because he has a problem with "translation", the plaintiff presented the court with a written note requesting a continuance of the hearing to give him an opportunity to seek counsel. Therefore, the court vacated its tentative ruling and DEFENDANTs P&G - CLAIROL INC. and THE PROCTER AND GAMBLE U.S. BUSINESS SERVICES' Motion For Dismissal And Entry Of Judgment For Failure To Timely Amend is continued to February 19, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Clerk to notify defendant's counsel of the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
